notes.releasePage: Hosted release-page command rendering is direct-native first, exposes Cloudflare only as an explicit opt-in toggle, and now uses scriptblock-based remote PowerShell launcher examples instead of pipe-to-iex.
notes.claudeCode: Launcher-first helper path through ~/.claude/settings.json. Route mode defaults to direct; Cloudflare is explicit opt-in for checked Anthropic-compatible targets, and env-mode preview now stays secretless/placeholder-first before any apply-time prompt.
notes.geminiCli: Launcher-first helper path. GOOGLE_GEMINI_BASE_URL stays on the direct service root by default, Cloudflare mode switches Gemini to the protected Google / Gemini v1beta owner path, and launcher env preview stays placeholder-first before any apply-time prompt.
notes.opencode: Helper-guided custom-provider path. OpenCode keeps one checked custom-provider root contract in both direct and Cloudflare modes; launcher preview stays placeholder-first, while the direct helper owns real config writes.
notes.hermes: Helper-guided profile-local path. Hermes keeps one checked custom-provider root contract in both direct and Cloudflare modes; launcher remains preview-first while the direct helper can write the profile-local .env, config.yaml, and SOUL.md files.
notes.verification: Checked local coverage now includes launcher route-mode behavior, launcher env-preview without real secret on the PowerShell path, setup-script dry-run contracts, and PowerShell bootstrap compatibility in scope. This does not claim live provider, deploy, or hosted Pages proof.
